title: Polish fixture copy
problem: Make the brownfield fixture copy better for operators while keeping the existing repo behavior unchanged.
context: Protostar is an existing TypeScript workspace with intent admission examples under examples/intents and deterministic draft promotion in the factory CLI.
constraints: Protostar authority is limited to creating and validating JSON fixture files under examples/intents/brownfield; do not change execution, review repair, delivery, or Dogpile planning internals.
stopConditions: Stop if admission reports ambiguity above 0.20, if the required-field checklist fails, or if policy flags authority outside examples/intents/brownfield.

toolPermissions.reason: Verify the deterministic intent admission fixture path.

expectedBlockReasons: manual acceptance criterion has no justification
ambiguity score must exceed the 0.20 admission ceiling
